title: orchis elata subsp. munbyana
intro: Orchis elata subsp. munbyana, also known as Munby's orchid, is a subspecies of the Orchis elata plant, which is a type of wild orchid native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orchis elata subsp. munbyana include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
